prompt: Create a cute anime chibi wallpaper on a pure white background with a large empty blank center, designed like playful peeking stickers around the edges. Show exactly 4 visible copies of the same chibi girl, all partially cropped by the canvas edges: 1 upside-down head peeking from the top edge near the upper left, 1 sideways head and hand peeking from the left edge in the lower-left quadrant, 1 sideways head peeking from the right edge in the upper-right quadrant with a tiny penguin accessory visible near her hair, and 1 main chibi girl peeking up from the bottom center with only her head, small hands, and upper shoulders visible. The character is a tiny penguin-themed chibi girl with glossy silver-white bob hair with cyan-blue tips, large sparkling blue-gray eyes, soft blush, a small gentle smile, rounded baby-face proportions, and short layered bangs. Outfit hints should be a navy-blue penguin-inspired hoodie or sailor-style top. Use clean modern anime line art, soft cel shading, high-detail reflective hair highlights, bright eyes with star-like reflections, pastel colors, and an airy kawaii mood. Composition should be minimal and spacious, with no text, no border, no watermark, no background objects, and no extra characters beyond the 4 counted peeking chibi copies.
